product_title: Poppi Sparkling Prebiotic Soda Beverage with Apple Cider Vinegar, Seltzer Water and Fruit Juice, Short List Variety Pack, 12 Fl Oz, Pack of 12, Packaging May Vary

reviews.title: Yummy and beneficial drink!
reviews.body: Me and my kids absolutely LOVE Poppi drinks! It's a great value purchasing a bulk bundle like this, plus these are the best flavors too! Highly recommend. Low in sugar and feels like a treat they taste so good. Always high quality and they have health benefits to them as well! Great product and will be ordering again!

reviews.product_name: Poppi Sparkling Prebiotic Soda Beverage with Apple Cider Vinegar, Seltzer Water and Fruit Juice, Short List Variety Pack, 12 Fl Oz, Pack of 12, Packaging May Vary

reviews.title: Gut-Friendly, Fizzy Family Favorite
reviews.body: Our household stopped buying soda long ago, and this Poppi variety pack has become our go-to sparkling treat. I’m currently going through chemo, and its combination of apple cider vinegar, fruit juice, seltzer, and prebiotics (inulin from agave and cassava) feels like a healthier swap that still tastes fun My 6‑year‑old cheers for the lemon‑lime and wild berry, and my 3‑year‑old can’t get enough of the orange cream. I love having something fizzy and satisfying that still supports my energy and gut during treatment. These cans are easy to toss in the fridge, take to car line, or enjoy during quiet work breaks. We’ve already reordered this pack twice and will keep it in our routine. If you want a bubbly, low‑sugar, slightly tangy drink that feels treat‑worthy but still health-conscious, Poppi is a winner.
reviews.product_name: Poppi Sparkling Prebiotic Soda Beverage with Apple Cider Vinegar, Seltzer Water and Fruit Juice, Short List Variety Pack, 12 Fl Oz, Pack of 12, Packaging May Vary

reviews.title: ABSOLUTELY LOVE THIS PRODUCT
reviews.body: Updated Review: I reached out to the company and they were so prompt at responding and so very nice, they offered to replace them even though they were only dented, but I am just so happy to know that if I ever need any replaced they are more than willing to do so and stand behind their AMAZING product!! Original Review: I absolutely love these drinks, how they taste and make me feel! My only thing is I am super surprised that non of them burst open this time, a lot of them had dents in them and a few of them barely sit upright because the tent was so bad. I don’t mind paying the price for these because they help me but they are too expensive to come looking like this. I would love to give 5 stars but couldn’t due to this.
reviews.product_name: Poppi Sparkling Prebiotic Soda Beverage with Apple Cider Vinegar, Seltzer Water and Fruit Juice, Short List Variety Pack, 12 Fl Oz, Pack of 12, Packaging May Vary

reviews.title: Prefer the newer flavors to the classics
reviews.body: I've tried the cola and the doc pop and I didn't like them at all. I cracked open a doc pop, obviously expecting it to taste like dr pepper, and it's nowhere close. The cola is the same. I think it's because I already have an expectation of what they taste like, especially dr pepper which has one of the most distinctive tastes. I now get the pack with raspberry rose, cherry lime, strawberry lemonade, and orange. And honestly, the orange is the worst of those 4 because again, I have an expectation for orange soda. It's the closest to the real thing though. But the other 3 are great because I don't have preconceived notion of how a raspberry rose soda should taste. Absolutely wonderful and I like to drink one in the afternoon to help me perk up from my mid-afternoon slump with a little reward.
reviews.product_name: Poppi Sparkling Prebiotic Soda Beverage with Apple Cider Vinegar, Seltzer Water and Fruit Juice, Short List Variety Pack, 12 Fl Oz, Pack of 12, Packaging May Vary

reviews.title: Hmm, variety options could be better
reviews.body: Some flavors are good but not all in the variety pack are. Needs more options in the variety sets. They are pricey and a waste of money if you don’t like all the flavors.
reviews.product_name: Poppi Sparkling Prebiotic Soda Beverage with Apple Cider Vinegar, Seltzer Water and Fruit Juice, Short List Variety Pack, 12 Fl Oz, Pack of 12, Packaging May Vary
